summary: Replayed ADR 0284 from committed repository release 0.177.113 on the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline by rerunning the governed Piper live-apply wrapper on docker-runtime-lv3, preserving the already-current 0.130.74 platform baseline, and re-verifying the private `8100` health, voices, and WAV synthesis path from the exact-main tree after the branch-local Docker recovery and port-collision fixes landed in canonical repo truth.

verification.check: Exact-main release readiness snapshot and dry run
verification.observed: `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` plus the patch dry run both completed on the exact-main integration branch; the transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-release-status-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch ...` prepared release `0.177.113` while preserving `platform_version: 0.130.74`; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-release-write-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Governed exact-main Piper replay from committed source
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=piper env=production` succeeded from committed source `521597584` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=116 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=9 rescued=0 ignored=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-live-apply-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main guest-local health and voices verification
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-local-http-r1.txt` confirms `docker port piper 5000/tcp` published both `10.10.10.20:8100` and `127.0.0.1:8100`, `GET /healthz` returned the healthy default voice payload, and `GET /api/voices` returned `en_US-ryan-medium`.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-host-path-tts-r1.txt` called `http://10.10.10.20:8100/api/tts?...` from `proxmox_florin` and returned the valid WAV summary `{"content_type":"audio/wav","riff":"RIFF","wave":"WAVE","bytes":109612}`.

verification.check: Branch-local audit trail for the repaired latest-main defects
verification.observed: The earlier branch-local receipt `receipts/live-applies/2026-03-31-adr-0284-piper-live-apply.json` plus its evidence files preserve the two latest-main defects this mainline replay depends on: stale Docker build-network drift and the proven collision between Piper's old `8099` listener and `temporal-ui`.

verification.check: Exact-main validation repair for Python 3.10 callback compatibility and generated diagrams
verification.observed: The first final gate attempts preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-validate-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-remote-validate-r1.txt` exposed two exact-main validation issues outside the Piper runtime itself: the `structured_log` callback imported `datetime.UTC` under a Python 3.10 idempotency interpreter, and the diagram surfaces were stale. The final tree now carries the Python 3.10 fallback in `collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/plugins/callback/structured_log.py`, widened callback coverage in `tests/test_structured_log_callback.py`, and regenerated diagram assets.

`uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_structured_log_callback.py tests/test_piper_runtime_role.py tests/test_piper_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py` returned `46 passed in 4.10s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-targeted-checks-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Final exact-main repository automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: `make check-build-server`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the corrected exact-main tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-check-build-server-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-validate-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-remote-validate-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r2.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-mainline-git-diff-check-r2.txt`.

After flipping `ws-0284-live-apply` to `merged` and `ws-0284-main-merge` to `live_applied`, regenerating canonical truth, the ops portal, and the platform manifest, `LV3_SNAPSHOT_BRANCH=main ./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces generated-docs generated-portals`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-main-candidate-validation-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-main-candidate-live-apply-receipts-validate-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0284-main-candidate-git-diff-check-r1.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0284 from committed repository release 0.177.113.
Platform version remains 0.130.74 because the exact-main replay verifies an already-live capability on the current baseline rather than introducing a new post-main platform mutation.

The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail because it records the stale Docker build-network failure and the real `8099` collision with `temporal-ui` that justified the final `8100` contract.

The final exact-main validation bundle also repaired a repo-automation issue outside Piper itself: the structured Ansible callback now falls back to `timezone.utc` under Python 3.10, and the generated diagram surfaces were refreshed before the passing remote and pre-push gates.
